title: Paulding County Board of Commissioners Work Session
sourceName: Paulding County Board of Commissioners meetings
summary: Work session covering transportation updates, parks capital planning, and budget calendar items.
plainEnglishSummary: County leaders are expected to discuss road work timing, parks upgrades, and the next steps in the budget process.
whyResidentsCare: These discussions shape future road projects, recreation funding, and how quickly county services can respond to growth.

title: Rockmart City Council Meeting
summary: Expected agenda items include downtown parking, public works updates, and special event permits.
plainEnglishSummary: Council members are expected to review parking, public works updates, and approvals tied to downtown events.
whyResidentsCare: Parking rules, street maintenance, and event approvals can affect downtown traffic and neighborhood access.

title: Marietta City Council Agenda Session
summary: Council is expected to review event permits, downtown mobility updates, and budget adjustments.
plainEnglishSummary: City leaders are expected to discuss downtown traffic, event permits, and budget changes that affect city services.
whyResidentsCare: These agenda items can affect daily traffic patterns, public spending priorities, and how community events are approved.

title: Cherokee County Community Meeting Calendar Review
summary: County leaders are expected to review upcoming public hearing dates, parks updates, and service scheduling items.
plainEnglishSummary: This meeting is expected to cover county service timing, parks updates, and the schedule for upcoming public hearings.
whyResidentsCare: Meeting schedules and county service decisions affect how residents plan around hearings, recreation programs, and public access.
